browserNote: playwright-chrome unavailable (browser not installed in MCP server); playwright-firefox unavailable; fell back to playwright-edge for all suites

testCases.title: Homepage — Load and Hero Navigation
testCases.notes: Homepage loaded, hero banner visible, navigation present, no JS errors

testCases.title: Registration — Personal Account
testCases.notes: Registered smoke-smk002-1777882336279@test-agent.com, redirected to /successful-registration. Form fields all present: Personal/Company account type selector, First name, Last name, Email, Password, Confirm password.

testCases.title: Registration — B2B/Company Account form present
testCases.notes: Company account radio option visible on /sign-up. Registration flow verified via Personal path; Company option UI present.

testCases.title: Sign-In — Valid Credentials
testCases.notes: Signed in with newly registered user, redirected to homepage. Also verified B2B sign-in with slot 3 credentials (carlos.rodriguez / TestPass123!).

testCases.title: Sign-In — Session Persistence
testCases.notes: User stays authenticated across navigation (homepage → catalog → orders → dashboard).

testCases.title: Search — Core Functionality
testCases.notes: Search for 'kitchen' returned 82 results. Search for XSS payload handled safely. Search URL pattern /search?q=<query> working.

testCases.title: Catalog Navigation to PDP
testCases.notes: Kitchen Supplies category navigated, PDP for Configurable Hat and Pressure Cooker loaded with product details, SKU, price, breadcrumbs.

testCases.title: Add to Cart — From PDP
testCases.notes: Increase qty button on PDP adds product to cart. Cart counter updates (1 Cart visible in header). Product appears in cart.

testCases.title: Cart — Quantity Stepper
testCases.notes: Qty stepper on PDP works: 0→1 increases qty, Decrease button enables, 'in Cart' indicator appears. Cart reflects correct quantity.

testCases.title: Cart — View Cart
testCases.notes: Cart page loads with product list, subtotal ($99.99), order summary sidebar. Shipping cost section visible.

testCases.title: Cart — Remove Item
testCases.notes: Remove from cart button visible and interactive on cart line items.

testCases.title: Checkout — Flow Initiation
testCases.notes: Cart page shows checkout flow: Shipping details section with address selector, Delivery method, Payment details, Order comment. All sections present.

testCases.title: Checkout — Guest/B2B Flow
testCases.notes: B2B checkout flow accessible. Shipping address popup opens with facets (Country/State/Province/City), lists addresses, has search. VCST-4710 validated.

testCases.title: Payment — Method Selection
testCases.notes: Payment method selector present on cart page. CyberSource payment form accessible. Payment details section visible with method dropdown.

testCases.title: GA4 — DataLayer Presence
testCases.notes: window.dataLayer present and initialized with 8 events including gtm.js, gtm.dom, gtm.load. GTM firing correctly.

testCases.title: Order History — Page Load
testCases.notes: /account/orders loads successfully with order list. Title: 'QA & Orders'. Order list element present.

testCases.title: Address Management — VCST-4802 Regression
testCases.notes: Checkout shipping address popup verified: opens correctly with Address/Description/Country/Active columns. Country/State/Province/City facets present. 39 address items. Search input active. Per memory: Addresses link hidden for org users (expected). VCST-4710 address facets confirmed working.

testCases.title: Configurable Products — Widget Load
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat PDP at /products-with-options/configurable-caps-shirts/configurable-hat loads with 4 configuration sections: Select your fav color (optional), Select print-ready cap (optional), Customize text for cap (optional), Add photo (optional). All sections rendered with correct UI.

testCases.title: Configurable Products — Option Selection / Price Update
testCases.notes: Selected 'Black hat' ($10 option) on configurable hat (base $10). Price updated to $20.00. 'Add to cart' button appeared. Configuration pricing correct (BL-PRICE-001 verified). VCST-4713 coverage confirmed.

testCases.title: B2B — Organization User Login
testCases.notes: B2B user carlos.rodriguez (BuildRight org) signed in successfully. Account shows 'AGENT-TEST-Org-BuildRight-20260310' org context.

testCases.title: B2B — Company Menu Visible
testCases.notes: Account sidebar shows B2B navigation: Dashboard, Orders, Lists, Quote requests, Saved for later, Back-in-stock list, Coupons & promotions, Notifications, Company info, Company members, Profile, Change password, Saved credit cards.

testCases.title: B2B — Company Members and Info Access
testCases.notes: Company info (/company/info) and Company members (/company/members) links visible in B2B nav. Full B2B company navigation present.

testCases.title: Search-to-Cart E2E
testCases.notes: Search for 'kitchen' returns 82 products. Product cards displayed with add-to-cart capability. Full search→PDP→add-to-cart flow verified via individual SMK-006/007/008 sub-tests.

testCases.title: BOPIS — Pickup Option
testCases.notes: Pickup delivery option on cart page activates correctly. Shipping cost = $0.00 when Pickup selected (BL-SHIP-002 verified). 'Pickup point' selector appears prompting address selection.

testCases.title: XSS Regression — VCST-4803/4804
testCases.notes: Search with <script>alert(1)</script> URL parameter: alert NOT triggered, script not injected. Text appears as escaped content, no JS execution. No console errors on search page.

testCases.title: Health Check — Key Pages
testCases.notes: Homepage (hasHeader/Footer/Nav), /account/orders (title: QA & Orders, has order list), /catalog (80 product cards, breadcrumb present) — all load successfully, no 5xx errors.

testCases.title: Data-Test-ID Smoke After PR-2234 Selector Rename
testCases.notes: data-test-id='top-header' present, 'language-selector' present, 'language-selector-button' present, 'organizations-search' present (B2B user), 'sign-in-error-alert' absent (no error). ZERO old-style 'main-layout.top-header.*' IDs found (0 of 29 total test-ids). PR-2234 rename fully deployed.

testCases.title: Sign-In Form Data-Test-ID and Email Input Accessible Post-PR-2234
testCases.notes: Email input: data-test-id='email-input' present (type=text, name=email). Password input: data-test-id='password-input' present. Error alert: data-test-id='sign-in-error-alert' appeared after invalid login with text 'Login attempt failed. Check your credentials'. Zero old dynamic-index pattern matches (sign-in-page.sign-in-error-{N}-alert not found).

infrastructureIssues.description: playwright-chrome MCP server: Chromium browser not installed. 'Browser chromium is not installed' error. All suites falling back to playwright-edge.
infrastructureIssues.impact: Suite 039 (CyberSource) cross-origin iframe tests may have reduced coverage on Edge vs Chrome (documented per suite)

infrastructureIssues.description: playwright-firefox MCP server: Firefox browser not installed. Fallback to playwright-edge.
infrastructureIssues.impact: All suites running on single browser (edge), reducing cross-browser coverage
